title: Dude
description: Agan and Kural have been inseparable since childhood. As they step into a new phase of life, unexpected challenges and emotions test their bond, leading them through a journey of love, growth, and self-discovery.

title: Thalapathi
description: Surya, a courageous young man abandoned at birth, grows up in the slums and becomes close friends with a powerful gangster named Devaraj. Their bond is tested when Surya unknowingly clashes with his own biological father, a respected district collector.

title: Thiruchitrambalam
tagline: Life is simple when love understands you.
description: Thiruchitrambalam, a delivery boy struggling with loneliness and family issues, finds comfort in his close friendship with Shobana. As life throws emotional challenges his way, he slowly discovers love, healing, and happiness in unexpected places.

title: Meiyazhagan
tagline: A heartwarming journey of friendship and roots.
description: A man's life is changed when he bumps into someone from his hometown in this moving Tamil-language drama; gentle scenes are occasionally punctuated by sporting threat and recollections of violence.

title: Ambikapathy
description: Ambikapathy, the son of a respected poet in the Chola kingdom, falls in love with princess Amaravathi. Their forbidden romance faces opposition from the powerful king, leading to an emotional tale of love, sacrifice, and destiny.

tagline: The most beautiful memories are the ones we can never relive.
description: A traveling photographer reunites with his childhood sweetheart at a school reunion after decades apart. As they spend a night revisiting memories, unresolved emotions and nostalgia resurface in this deeply emotional romantic drama.

title: 7G Rainbow Colony
tagline: A tragic love story that echoes forever.
description: Kathir, an aimless young man from a lower-middle-class family, falls deeply in love with his new neighbor Anita. Their emotional relationship transforms his life, but fate takes a heartbreaking turn.

title: Retro
description: A former gangster trying to leave behind his violent past is pulled back into a dangerous world when old enemies resurface. Torn between love and loyalty, he fights for redemption while protecting the people he cares about.

title: Gypsy
tagline: A journey beyond borders, religion, and hate.
description: A wandering musician travels across India and falls in love with a woman from an orthodox Muslim family. Their relationship is tested amid rising communal tensions and political unrest.

title: Vaaranam Aayiram
tagline: A father. A son. A journey through life and love.
description: After the sudden death of his father, Suriya reflects on the memories, lessons, relationships, and emotional moments that shaped his life. The film explores love, heartbreak, friendship, family, and personal growth across different stages of his journey.

title: The Greatest of All Time
tagline: One man. Many faces. Infinite danger.
description: A former special anti-terrorism squad leader is pulled back into action when his past missions begin to threaten national security. As secrets unfold, he faces betrayal, high-stakes action, and emotional conflicts tied to his family and identity.

title: Dune: Part two
description: Paul Atreides unites with Chani and the Fremen while seeking revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he endeavors to prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

title: RRR
description: A fictional history of two legendary revolutionaries' journey away from home before they began fighting for their country in the 1920s.

title: Captain America: Civil War
description: Political involvement in the Avengers' affairs causes a rift between Captain America and Iron Man.

title: Oppenheimer
description: The story of J. Robert Oppenheimer's role in the development of the atomic bomb during World War II, exploring the complex scientific, political, and ethical dilemmas of creating the ultimate weapon.

title: Baahubali 2: The Conclusion
tagline: The Boy Became a King. The King Became a Legend.
description: When Mahendra Baahubali, the son of Amarendra Baahubali, learns about his heritage, he begins to look for answers. His story is juxtaposed with past events that unfolded in the Mahishmati Kingdom.

title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
tagline: It's how you wear the mask.
description: After reuniting with Gwen Stacy, Brooklyn's full-time, friendly neighborhood Spider-Man is catapulted across the Multiverse, where he encounters a team of Spider-People charged with protecting its very existence.

title: K.G.F: Chapter 2
description: In the blood-soaked Kolar Gold Fields, Rocky's name strikes fear into his foes. While his allies look up to him, the government sees him as a threat to law and order. Rocky must battle threats from all sides for unchallenged supremacy.

title: Interstellar
tagline: Mankind was born on Earth. It was never meant to die here.
description: The adventures of a group of explorers who make use of a newly discovered wormhole to surpass the limitations on human space travel and conquer the vast distances involved in an interstellar voyage.

title: Kantara
description: Set in the fictional village of Dakshina Kannada, Kantara is a story of a human-nature conflict where a rebel Kambala champion, Shiva, stands against forest officers trying to protect land owned by a landlord family.

title: The Dark Knight
description: When the menace known as the Joker wreaks havoc and chaos on the people of Gotham, Batman must accept one of the greatest psychological and physical tests of his ability to fight injustice.

title: Vikram
tagline: Once a king, always a king.
description: A special ops team led by Amar is investigating a case of serial killings of narcotics division officials. Amar soon realizes that the killers are part of a massive drug cartel, leading him to a legendary black-ops hero named Vikram.

title: Avatar: The Way of Water
description: Jake Sully lives with his newfound family formed on the extrasolar moon Pandora. Once a familiar threat returns to finish what was previously started, Jake must work with Neytiri and the army of the Na'vi race to protect their home.

title: Leo
tagline: Keep calm and avoid the battle.
description: Parthiban is a mild-mannered cafe owner in Himachal Pradesh who rescues a hyena and becomes a local hero. However, his actions draw the attention of a drug cartel who claim he is Leo Das, the estranged son of their ruthless leader.

title: John Wick: Chapter 4
tagline: No way back. One way out.
description: John Wick uncovers a path to defeating The High Table. But before he can earn his freedom, Wick must face a new enemy with powerful alliances across the globe and forces that turn old friends into foes.

title: Barbie
description: Barbie and Ken are having the time of their lives in the colorful and seemingly perfect world of Barbie Land. However, when they get a chance to go to the real world, they soon discover the joys and perils of living among humans.

title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
tagline: The universe is so much bigger than you realize.
description: A middle-aged Chinese immigrant is swept up into an insane adventure in which she alone can save existence by exploring other universes and connecting with the lives she could have led.

title: The Batman
description: In his second year of fighting crime, Batman uncovers corruption in Gotham City that connects to his own family while facing a serial killer known as the Riddler.

title: Inception
tagline: Your mind is the scene of the crime.
description: A thief who steals corporate secrets through the use of dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into the mind of a C.E.O.

title: Gladiator
tagline: What we do in life echoes in eternity.
description: A former Roman General sets out to exact vengeance against the corrupt emperor who murdered his family and sent him into slavery.

title: Avengers: Endgame
description: After the devastating events of Avengers: Infinity War, the universe is in ruins. With the help of remaining allies, the Avengers assemble once more in order to reverse Thanos' actions.

title: Titanic
tagline: Nothing on Earth could come between them.
description: A seventeen-year-old aristocrat falls in love with a kind but poor artist aboard the luxurious, ill-fated R.M.S. Titanic.

title: The Matrix
description: When a beautiful stranger leads computer hacker Neo to a forbidding underworld, he discovers the shocking truth--the life he knows is the elaborate deception of an evil cyber-intelligence.

title: Pulp Fiction
tagline: Just because you are a character doesn't mean that you have character.
description: The lives of two mob hitmen, a boxer, a gangster and his wife, and a pair of diner bandits intertwine in four tales of violence and redemption.

title: The Fellowship of the Ring
tagline: One Ring to rule them all.
description: A meek Hobbit from the Shire and eight companions set out on a journey to destroy the powerful One Ring and save Middle-earth from the Dark Lord Sauron.

title: Parasite
tagline: Act like you own the place.
description: Greed and class discrimination threaten the newly formed symbiotic relationship between the wealthy Park family and the destitute Kim clan.

title: Spirited Away
tagline: Nothing that happens is ever forgotten, even if you can't remember it.
description: During her family's move to the suburbs, a sullen 10-year-old girl wanders into a world ruled by gods, witches, and spirits, and where humans are changed into beasts.

title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
tagline: More than one wears the mask.
description: Teen Miles Morales becomes the Spider-Man of his universe, and must join with five spider-powered individuals from other dimensions to stop a threat for all realities.

title: Guardians of the Galaxy
description: A group of intergalactic criminals must pull together to stop a fanatical warrior with plans to purge the universe.

title: Mad Max: Fury Road
description: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, a woman rebels against a tyrannical ruler in search for her homeland with the aid of a group of female prisoners, a psychotic worshiper, and a drifter named Max.

title: Whiplash
description: A promising young drummer enrolls at a cut-throat music conservatory where his dreams of greatness are mentored by an instructor who will stop at nothing to realize a student's potential.

title: The Lion King
description: A young lion prince Simba is cast out of his pride by his cruel uncle, who claims Simba killed his father. Simba must find his way back to claim his destiny.

title: Inside Out 2
description: Teenager Riley's mind headquarters is undergoing a sudden demolition to make room for something entirely unexpected: new Emotions! Anxiety, Envy, Ennui, and Embarrassment.

title: Dune
description: Paul Atreides, a brilliant and gifted young man born into a great destiny beyond his understanding, must travel to the most dangerous planet in the universe to ensure the future of his family and his people.

title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
description: With Spider-Man's identity now revealed, Peter asks Doctor Strange for help. When a spell goes wrong, dangerous foes from other worlds start to appear, forcing Peter to discover what it truly means to be Spider-Man.

title: Top Gun: Maverick
description: After thirty years, Maverick is still pushing the envelope as a top naval aviator, but must confront ghosts of his past when he leads TOP GUN's elite graduates on a mission that demands the ultimate sacrifice.

title: Black Panther
description: T'Challa, heir to the hidden kingdom of Wakanda, must step forward to lead his people into a new future and confront a challenger from his country's past.

title: Coco
description: Aspiring musician Miguel, confronted with his family's ancestral ban on music, enters the Land of the Dead to find his great-great-grandfather, a legendary singer.

title: Joker
description: During the 1980s, a failed stand-up comedian is driven insane and turns to a life of crime and chaos in Gotham City while becoming an infamous psychopathic figure.

title: Your Name.
tagline: I'm looking for you, whom I've never met.
description: Two strangers find themselves linked in a bizarre way. When a connection is form, will distance be the only thing to keep them apart?

title: Demon Slayer: Mugen Train
tagline: With your blade, bring an end to the nightmare.
description: After a string of mysterious disappearances aboard a train, the Demon Slayer Corps sends its best to eliminate the demon responsible.

title: Godzilla Minus One
tagline: Postwar Japan, from zero to minus.
description: Postwar Japan is at its lowest point when a new crisis emerges in the form of a giant monster, baptized in the horrific power of the atomic bomb.

title: Baahubali: The Beginning
description: In ancient India, an adventurous and daring man. Shivudu falls in love with Avanthika, a warrior and helps her rescue her queen Devasena from the captivity of king Bhallaladeva.

title: K.G.F: Chapter 1
description: Rocky, a young man, seeks power and wealth in order to fulfill a promise made to his dying mother. His quest takes him to the gold mines of Kolar.

title: Pushpa: The Rise
description: Violence erupts between red sandalwood smugglers and the police in the Seshachalam forests of Andhra Pradesh. A coolie, Pushpa Raj, rises to lead the smuggling syndicate.

title: Jailer
description: Muthuvel Pandian is a retired jailer who lives a peaceful family life. When his son, an honest police officer, goes missing while investigating an idol smuggling ring, Muthuvel sets out to find him.

title: Minnal Murali
description: A tailor receives superpowers after being struck by lightning, and must become the protector of his hometown when a dark force threatens the village.

title: Manjummel Boys
tagline: A test of friendship in the deep caves.
description: A group of friends from a small town in Kerala embark on a trip to Kodaikanal. Their holiday turns into a rescue mission when one of them falls into the Guna Caves.

title: Premalu
description: Sachin navigates romance and friendship in Hyderabad, finding himself caught between two love interests in this delightful romantic comedy.

title: Bramayugam
description: A court singer escapes slavery and finds shelter in a mysterious manor owned by a mysterious landlord, leading to a dark battle for survival.

title: Ponniyin Selvan: Part I
description: Vandiyathevan sets out to cross the Chola land to deliver a message from the Crown Prince, while conspiracies and threats emerge around the throne.

title: Ponniyin Selvan: Part II
description: Arulmozhi Varman continues his journey to become Rajaraja I, the greatest ruler of the Chola empire, while facing threats from internal conspirators.

title: Kaithi
description: A recently released prisoner is forced to drive a truck full of unconscious police officers to save their lives in exchange for meeting his daughter.

title: Thallumaala
description: An internet celebrity and cafe owner's wedding preparation is disrupted by a series of comic brawls and internet rivalries.

title: Dangal
tagline: Are my girls any less than boys?
description: Mahavir Singh Phogat, a former amateur wrestler, trains his daughters Geeta and Babita to become world-class wrestlers despite societal oppression.

title: 3 Idiots
tagline: Chase excellence, and success will follow.
description: Two college friends seek their long-lost buddy who taught them to think differently and live life on their own terms, despite societal pressure.

title: Sholay
description: A retired police officer hires two outlaws to capture a notorious dacoit who slaughtered his family and terrorized his village.

title: Lagaan
tagline: Once upon a time in India.
description: In Victorian India, a young farmer accepts a challenge from a British captain to play a game of cricket in exchange for avoiding high taxes.

title: Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge
description: Raj and Simran meet on a trip to Europe. Raj falls in love with Simran, but she is already promised to another man in India.

title: Jawan
description: A high-octane action thriller which outlines the emotional journey of a man who is set to rectify the wrongs in the society, with the help of a group of tough girls.

title: Pathaan
description: An Indian agent must stop a rogue outfit from spreading a deadly virus across the country in this action-packed thriller.

title: Animal
description: The son of a business tycoon returns from abroad after an assassination attempt on his father, triggering a massive gang war and bloodbath.

title: Tumbbad
description: A mythological story about a family who builds a shrine for Hastar, a monster god who can grant infinite gold, leading to generational curse.

title: Fight Club
description: An insomniac office worker and a devil-may-care soap maker form an underground fight club that evolves into much more.

title: Kattradhu Thamizh
tagline: The tagline 'Tamil MA' behind this title was added to avail the then-current entertainment tax exemption. The film, directed by Ram and starring Jeeva, released in 2007, revolved around the life struggles of a Master of Arts Tamil literature graduate.
description: Kattradhu Thamizh (2007) is a dark psychological drama following Prabhakar (Jeeva), a highly educated Tamil M.A. graduate whose life falls apart due to societal neglect, class divides, and failure to find a proper job. Broken by trauma, poverty, and the loss of loved ones, he turns into a nihilistic, psychopathic serial killer, ultimately targeting the system that failed him

title: Anbe Sivam
description: Two contrasting men—a pragmatic, arrogant corporate ad-filmmaker named Anbarasu (Madhavan) and a physically scarred, wise-cracking socialist named Nallasivam (Kamal Haasan)—are stranded at the Bhubaneswar airport due to heavy rain. Forced to travel to Chennai together, their journey transforms into a philosophical exploration of humanity, love, religion, and capitalism. Through a series of comedic and tragic events, Nallasivam's selfless worldview profoundly alters Anbarasu's selfish priorities, teaching him that God is not found in rituals, but in the compassionate heart of a stranger.

title: uttama villain
tagline: En udhirathin vithai... en uyir udhirtha sadhai... ver oruvanai bhagavan ena poruthiduvena?
description: In the 8th-century folklore segment: It is spoken by the arrogant King Iraniyan (demon Hiranyakashipu), who cannot accept that his son Prahaladan worships Lord Vishnu instead of him.

title: Karuppu
tagline: When justice fails, the deity awakens.
description: A lawyer becomes possessed by a powerful village deity and rises against corruption, caste oppression, and injustice affecting marginalized communities.

title: Indi Makaanam Era Thambi
tagline: It’s Not Complicated. It’s Just Complicated.
description: In the midst of a chaotic family drama, a young man navigates love, tradition, and betrayal while struggling to find his place in a world where nothing is as it seems.

title: Attack on Titan
tagline: Humanity fights back from behind the walls.
description: After giant Titans breach the walls protecting the last human settlements, Eren Yeager joins the Scout Regiment and uncovers a war that reaches far beyond survival.

title: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba
tagline: A blade, a bond, and a fight against demons.
description: Tanjiro Kamado becomes a demon slayer after his family is attacked and his sister Nezuko is transformed, chasing a cure through battles against terrifying demons.

title: Chainsaw Man
tagline: The devil hunter with a chainsaw heart.
description: Denji, a broke young devil hunter, is reborn with the power of his chainsaw devil companion and pulled into a brutal world of contracts, monsters, and desire.

title: Stranger Things
tagline: A small town opens a door to the Upside Down.
description: When a boy vanishes in Hawkins, Indiana, his friends uncover secret experiments, a mysterious girl with powers, and a terrifying dimension beneath their town.

title: Wednesday
description: Wednesday Addams studies at Nevermore Academy while tracking a monster, solving a family mystery, and trying very hard not to enjoy making friends.

title: Squid Game
tagline: Childhood games turn into a deadly contest.
description: Hundreds of desperate players enter a hidden competition for a massive cash prize, only to discover that losing each game carries fatal consequences.
